# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "myorg/myapp",
    "description": "Application with automated setup scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "process-timeout": 300,
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": false,
        "secure-http": true,
        "lock": true
    },
    "scripts": {
        "verify-checksums": [
            "php scripts/verify-checksums.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log var/tmp public/assets public/build",
            "chmod 755 var/cache var/log var/tmp"
        ],
        "setup-config": [
            "php scripts/setup-config.php"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "run-migrations": [
            "php scripts/run-migrations.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "php scripts/clear-cache.php"
        ],
        "security-audit": [
            "@composer audit"
        ],
        "validate-lock": [
            "@composer validate --strict"
        ],
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@validate-lock",
            "@security-audit",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@setup-config",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@clear-cache"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@validate-lock",
            "@security-audit",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@setup-config",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@clear-cache"
        ]
    }
}
